caption: The video depicts a group of medical professionals, likely nurses or students, gathered in a classroom setting for a training session during "Sim Week." The participants are seated around long tables arranged in a U-shape, facing a panel of instructors or presenters who are seated at the front. Most attendees are wearing blue scrubs, indicating their medical affiliation. The room is well-lit and equipped with modern amenities, including a large screen at the back wall. The participants appear engaged, with some taking notes and others listening attentively. The atmosphere suggests an interactive and educational environment aimed at enhancing clinical skills and knowledge.
